name: Admiral Ackbar
description: Mon Calamari admiral and skilled fleet commander of the Rebel Alliance. Famous for leading the assault on the second Death Star and his iconic warning: 'It's a trap!'

name: Agent Kallus
description: Imperial Security Bureau agent who initially hunted the Ghost crew, later became a Rebel spy known as Fulcrum.

name: Agent Terex
description: First Order security bureau officer and former stormtrooper. Pursued Poe Dameron and Black Squadron.

name: Ahsoka Tano
description: Former Jedi Padawan of Anakin Skywalker. Force-user who fought against the Empire and later aided Mandalorians in the New Republic era.

name: Almec
description: Former Prime Minister of Mandalore who collaborated with Darth Maul's Shadow Collective.

name: Anakin Skywalker
description: Powerful Jedi who turned to the dark side and became Darth Vader. Central figure connecting the prequel and original trilogies.

name: Ar'alani
description: Admiral of the Chiss Ascendancy Defense Fleet and close ally of Thrawn. A skilled and respected commander in the Unknown Regions.

name: Arihnda Pryce
description: Governor of Lothal and Imperial political operative. Allied with Thrawn against the Ghost rebel crew.

name: Aryn Leneer
description: Jedi Knight who sought revenge after her master was killed during the sacking of Coruscant by Darth Malgus.

name: Asajj Ventress
description: Dark side assassin and apprentice of Count Dooku. Skilled lightsaber duelist and former Nightsister.

name: Avar Kriss
description: Heroic Jedi Master of the High Republic era, known for her unique ability to sense the Force as music. Led the response to the Great Hyperspace Disaster.

name: Bail Organa
description: Senator of Alderaan, early Rebel founder and adoptive father of Leia Organa.

name: Barriss Offee
description: Jedi Padawan who secretly bombed the Jedi Temple and framed Ahsoka Tano, disillusioned with the Order.

name: Bastila Shan
description: Gifted Jedi with the rare ability of Battle Meditation. Companion and love interest of Revan during the Jedi Civil War.

name: Baylan Skoll
description: Former Jedi Knight turned mercenary. Seeks ancient power beyond the known galaxy.

name: Baze Malbus
description: Heavy weapons specialist and guardian from Jedha. Member of Rogue One team that stole the Death Star plans.

name: Beilert Valance
description: Cyborg bounty hunter with a complicated moral code. Once an Imperial stormtrooper, he became a hunter known for both ruthlessness and unexpected acts of heroism.

name: Bell Zettifar
description: Jedi Padawan during the High Republic era who faced personal loss and emerged as a key hero against the Nihil threat.

name: Ben Solo
description: Son of Han Solo and Leia Organa. Seduced to the dark side and became Kylo Ren, leader of the Knights of Ren.

name: Black Krrsantan
description: Fearsome Wookiee bounty hunter who worked for Jabba the Hutt and later crossed paths with Doctor Aphra.

name: Bo-Katan Kryze
description: Mandalorian warrior and leader. Helps Din Djarin and Grogu in the post-Empire era.

name: Boba Fett
description: Legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter, clone of Jango Fett. Known for his armor and ruthless efficiency.

name: Bodhi Rook
description: Imperial pilot who defected to the Rebellion. Key member of Rogue One.

name: Bossk
description: Trandoshan bounty hunter known for hunting Wookiees. Worked alongside Boba Fett on several occasions.

name: BT-1 (Beetee)
description: Assassin droid disguised as an astromech, modeled after R2-D2. Partner of Triple-Zero and Doctor Aphra.

name: C-3PO
description: Golden protocol droid fluent in over six million forms of communication. Long-time companion of R2-D2.

name: Cad Bane
description: Ruthless Duros bounty hunter feared across the galaxy. Frequently hired by the Separatists and crime lords during the Clone Wars.

name: Cade Skywalker
description: Descendant of Luke Skywalker living over 130 years after Return of the Jedi. A former Jedi turned bounty hunter.

name: Captain Rex
description: Clone trooper captain and loyal commander in the 501st Legion. One of Anakin Skywalker's most trusted soldiers during the Clone Wars.

name: Captain Typho
description: Head of security for Senator Padmé Amidala, nephew of Captain Panaka.

name: Cassian Andor
description: Rebel intelligence officer and leader of the Rogue One mission to steal Death Star plans.

name: Cham Syndulla
description: Twi'lek freedom fighter and father of Hera Syndulla. Led resistance against the Empire on Ryloth.

name: Chancellor Palpatine
description: Deceptive politician who became Emperor Palpatine and orchestrated the fall of the Republic.

name: Che'ri
description: Young Chiss sky-walker with Force-like navigational abilities. Bonded with her caregiver Thalias.

name: Chewbacca
description: Loyal Wookiee co-pilot of the Millennium Falcon. Lifelong friend of Han Solo.

name: Chirrut Îmwe
description: Blind warrior monk devoted to the Force. Member of Rogue One team.

name: Ciena Ree
description: Imperial officer from Jelucan who remained loyal to the Empire throughout the Galactic Civil War. Childhood friend and love interest of Thane Kyrell.

name: Cognus
description: Sith apprentice who succeeded Darth Zannah, continuing the Rule of Two lineage.

name: Cordé
description: One of Padmé Amidala's handmaidens who served as her decoy and died in her place.

name: Count Dooku
description: Former Jedi Master turned Sith Lord. Leader of the Separatists during the Clone Wars.

name: Count Vidian
description: Ruthless Imperial efficiency expert and cyborg who oversaw resource extraction operations.

name: Crosshair
description: Elite sniper of Clone Force 99 whose inhibitor chip made him loyal to the Empire, creating conflict with his squad.

name: Darth Bane
description: Sith Lord who destroyed the Brotherhood of Darkness and established the Rule of Two: one master and one apprentice. Founded the Sith lineage that would eventually produce Darth Sidious.

name: Darth Krayt
description: Sith Lord and founder of the One Sith who conquered the galaxy over 130 years after Return of the Jedi.

name: Darth Malgus
description: Fearsome Sith Lord who led the brutal sacking of Coruscant during the Great Galactic War. Known for his raw power and unorthodox views on the Sith Empire.

name: Darth Maul
description: Sith apprentice with double-bladed lightsaber. Served Darth Sidious in the prequel era.

name: Darth Plagueis
description: Muun Sith Lord obsessed with manipulating midi-chlorians to conquer death. Master of Darth Sidious and architect of the Sith Grand Plan.

name: Darth Sidious
description: Secret identity of Chancellor/Emperor Palpatine. Master manipulator behind the Clone Wars.

name: Darth Tenebrous
description: Sith Master who trained Darth Plagueis. A Bith scientist who sought to manipulate midi-chlorians and achieve immortality through his apprentice.

name: Darth Vader
description: Iconic Sith Lord, formerly Anakin Skywalker. Enforcer of the Galactic Empire.

name: Darth Zannah
description: Apprentice of Darth Bane, skilled in Sith sorcery and deception. Destined to one day challenge her master for the title of Dark Lord.

name: Dedra Meero
description: Ambitious ISB supervisor determined to uncover and crush the growing Rebel network.

name: Dengar
description: Corellian bounty hunter with a cybernetic skull. One of the hunters hired by Darth Vader to find the Millennium Falcon.

name: Din Djarin (The Mandalorian)
description: Bounty hunter following the Mandalorian way. Protector of Grogu in the New Republic era.

name: Doctor Aphra
description: Rogue archaeologist and scoundrel who briefly worked for Darth Vader. Known for her wit, greed, and morally ambiguous adventures across the galaxy.

name: Dormé
description: One of Padmé Amidala's loyal handmaidens, serving as her decoy and confidante during her time as Senator.

name: Dryden Vos
description: High-ranking criminal syndicate leader encountered by young Han Solo.

name: Echo
description: Clone trooper who survived capture and cybernetic modification. Joined Clone Force 99 as a valued member.

name: Eli Vanto
description: Imperial officer and loyal aide to Grand Admiral Thrawn. Later sent as an envoy to the Chiss Ascendancy.

name: Elzar Mann
description: Bold and unconventional Jedi Master of the High Republic era. Close friend of Avar Kriss who struggled with the temptations of the dark side.

name: Emperor Palpatine
description: The Dark Lord of the Sith who ruled the Galactic Empire for decades.

name: Enfys Nest
description: Leader of the Cloud-Riders marauder gang. Crossed paths with young Han Solo.

name: Ezra Bridger
description: Force-sensitive orphan from Lothal who became a Jedi rebel fighter under Kanan Jarrus's guidance.

name: Farzala Tarent
description: Jedi Padawan during the High Republic era, member of the young Jedi crew facing the Nihil.

name: Fennec Shand
description: Elite mercenary and assassin. Close ally of Boba Fett after he saved her life on Tatooine.

name: Finn
description: Former stormtrooper who defected to the Resistance. Key hero of the sequel trilogy.

name: Fives (CT-5555)
description: Clone trooper of the 501st Legion who uncovered the conspiracy behind the inhibitor chips and Order 66.

name: Galen Erso
description: Scientist forced to design the Death Star. Father of Jyn Erso.

name: General Grievous
description: Cyborg Separatist general who hunted Jedi during the Clone Wars.

name: Githany
description: Former Jedi who joined the Sith Brotherhood of Darkness. A deadly warrior and seductress who crossed paths with Darth Bane.

name: Gnost-Dural
description: Kel Dor Jedi Master and historian who chronicled the Great Galactic War.

name: Grand Admiral Thrawn
description: Brilliant Chiss Imperial strategist who nearly crushed the early Rebellion. Returned as a major threat in the New Republic era.

name: Grand Moff Tarkin
description: High-ranking Imperial officer who oversaw the Death Star project.

name: Grogu
description: Force-sensitive child of Yoda's species. Protected by the Mandalorian.

name: Han Solo
description: Smuggler turned Rebel hero. Captain of the Millennium Falcon.

name: Hera Syndulla
description: Twi'lek pilot and leader of the Ghost rebel crew. One of the Rebellion's most skilled commanders.

name: Hunter
description: Leader of Clone Force 99 (Bad Batch). Possesses enhanced tactical senses and serves as the squad's field commander.

name: Jabba the Hutt
description: Notorious crime lord on Tatooine. Captor of Han Solo.

name: Jan Dodonna
description: Rebel Alliance general who planned the attack on the Death Star at the Battle of Yavin.

name: Jango Fett
description: Notorious bounty hunter and template for the clone army.

name: Jannah
description: Former stormtrooper who joined the Resistance. Fought in the final battle against Palpatine.

name: Jar Jar Binks
description: Gungan representative who helped the Jedi on Naboo.

name: Jocasta Nu
description: Chief Librarian of the Jedi Archives. Survived Order 66 and worked to preserve Jedi knowledge against the Empire.

name: Johun Othone
description: Jedi Knight and survivor of the Ruusan campaign who pursued Darth Bane.

name: Joruus C'baoth
description: Insane clone of Jedi Master Jorus C'baoth. Served Grand Admiral Thrawn and sought to control Luke Skywalker.

name: Jyn Erso
description: Rebel leader who stole the Death Star plans in Rogue One.

name: K-2SO
description: Reprogrammed Imperial security droid. Sarcastic member of Rogue One.

name: Kaeden Larte
description: Farmer and friend of Ahsoka Tano during her exile after Order 66. Helped draw Ahsoka back into the fight.

name: Kanan Jarrus
description: Jedi survivor of Order 66 who mentored Ezra Bridger. Leader of the Ghost rebel cell.

name: Kas'im
description: Twi'lek Sith weapons master of the Brotherhood of Darkness. Trained Darth Bane in lightsaber combat.

name: Keeve Trennis
description: Newly knighted Jedi during the High Republic era. Faced the Nihil threat and personal trials of faith in the Force.

name: Kerra Holt
description: Jedi Knight operating alone in Sith-controlled space a thousand years before the films.

name: Kirak Infil'a
description: Jedi Master who survived Order 66. Confronted Darth Vader in a fierce duel.

name: Kylo Ren
description: Dark side warrior and leader of the Knights of Ren. Son of Han and Leia.

name: L3-37
description: Self-made droid and co-pilot during Han Solo's early adventures.

name: Lando Calrissian
description: Smuggler, gambler and administrator of Cloud City. Later joined the Rebellion.

name: Leia Organa
description: Princess, general and leader of the Resistance. Daughter of Anakin Skywalker.

name: Loden Greatstorm
description: Twi'lek Jedi Master and mentor during the High Republic era. Captured by the Nihil during the Great Hyperspace Disaster.

name: Lord Kaan
description: Leader of the Brotherhood of Darkness and Sith Lord who clashed with Darth Bane.

name: Lord Momin
description: Ancient Sith sculptor whose spirit was preserved in his helmet. Aided Darth Vader in constructing his fortress on Mustafar.

name: Lord Scourge
description: Sith Lord who allied with Revan and Meetra Surik against the Sith Emperor in the Old Republic era.

name: Lourna Dee
description: Tempest Runner of the Nihil marauders. A cunning and ruthless Twi'lek criminal leader.

name: Luke Skywalker
description: Jedi hero who helped destroy the Empire. Son of Anakin Skywalker.

name: Lula Talisola
description: Young Jedi Padawan during the High Republic era who faced the Nihil threat alongside her fellow students.

name: Luthen Rael
description: Galactic antiques dealer who secretly masterminded early Rebel recruitment networks against the Empire.

name: Lyra Erso
description: Wife of scientist Galen Erso and mother of Jyn Erso. A determined woman who tried to protect her family from Imperial manipulation.

name: Mace Windu
description: Powerful Jedi Master and member of the Jedi Council.

name: Mara Jade
description: Former Emperor's Hand and elite assassin who was ordered to kill Luke Skywalker. Later became a Jedi Master.

name: Marchion Ro
description: Cunning and ruthless Eye of the Nihil marauders. Orchestrated devastating attacks against the High Republic.

name: Meetra Surik (The Exile)
description: Exiled Jedi Knight who reconnected with the Force and confronted the Sith Triumvirate. Sought Revan in the Old Republic era.

name: Moff Gideon
description: Imperial warlord and commander of an Imperial remnant. Sought Grogu for his Force-sensitive blood.

name: Mon Mothma
description: Senator of Chandrila and co-founder of the Rebel Alliance. Risked everything to fund the early Rebellion.

name: Mother Talzin
description: Powerful Nightsister shaman and matriarch of the Dathomir witches. Master of dark magick.

name: Nash Windrider
description: Imperial officer and friend of Ciena Ree, deeply loyal to the Empire throughout the Galactic Civil War.

name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
description: Wise Jedi Master who trained Anakin Skywalker and later Luke Skywalker.

name: Ochi of Bestoon
description: Sith assassin and loyalist who served Emperor Palpatine. Hunted the family of Rey on Jakku.

name: Omega
description: Unmodified female clone of Jango Fett with a pure genetic template. Adopted by Clone Force 99 as their own.

name: Orson Krennic
description: Director of the Death Star project. Antagonist in Rogue One.

name: Padmé Amidala
description: Queen and later Senator of Naboo. Secret wife of Anakin Skywalker.

name: Plo Koon
description: Kel Dor Jedi Master and member of the Jedi High Council. Famed for his bond with clone troopers.

name: Poe Dameron
description: Skilled Resistance pilot and commander. Key figure in the fight against the First Order.

name: Princess Leia Organa
description: See Leia Organa (same character, earlier title used in some films).

name: Qi'ra
description: Former love interest of Han Solo. Became a high-ranking criminal operative.

name: Qordis
description: Head of the Sith Academy on Korriban and member of the Brotherhood of Darkness.

name: Qort
description: Jedi Padawan during the High Republic era, known for wearing a helmet made from a Trandoshan skull.

name: Queen Padmé Amidala
description: See Padmé Amidala (same character, earlier title used in Episode I).

name: Qui-Gon Jinn
description: Maverick Jedi Master who discovered Anakin Skywalker and believed him to be the Chosen One. Trained Obi-Wan Kenobi.

name: Quinlan Vos
description: Unorthodox Jedi Master with the rare ability to read memories through touch. Partnered with Asajj Ventress on a dangerous mission during the Clone Wars.

name: R2-D2
description: Astromech droid famous for bravery and resourcefulness across the saga.

name: Rael Averross
description: Jedi Knight and former Padawan of Count Dooku. Served as regent of Pijal and old friend of Qui-Gon Jinn.

name: Ransolm Casterfo
description: New Republic senator and unlikely ally of Leia Organa. An Imperial memorabilia collector whose loyalty was ultimately tested.

name: Reva (Third Sister)
description: Former Jedi youngling who became an Inquisitor seeking revenge on Darth Vader for the massacre at the Temple.

name: Revan
description: Legendary Jedi Knight turned Sith Lord and back again. Central figure of the Old Republic era whose choices shaped the fate of the galaxy.

name: Rey
description: Force-sensitive scavenger who became a Jedi. Central hero of the sequel trilogy.

name: Rose Tico
description: Resistance mechanic and fighter. Joined the fight against the First Order.

name: Rotta the Hutt
description: Huttlet child involved in early Mandalorian & Grogu adventures.

name: Sabine Wren
description: Mandalorian warrior, artist and explosives expert. Member of the Ghost crew and wielder of the Darksaber.

name: Sabé
description: Padmé Amidala's most trusted handmaiden and decoy. Later crossed paths with Darth Vader while seeking the truth about Padmé's death.

name: Sana Starros
description: Smuggler who claimed to be Han Solo's wife. Later became an ally of the Rebellion.

name: Satele Shan
description: Legendary Jedi Grand Master during the Old Republic era and descendant of Bastila Shan. Led the Jedi Order through the Great Galactic War.

name: Savage Opress
description: Nightbrother warrior and brother of Darth Maul. Empowered by Mother Talzin to serve as Dooku's apprentice.

name: Saw Gerrera
description: Extremist rebel leader and freedom fighter. Led a partisan cell with brutal tactics the Alliance considered too extreme.

name: Set Harth
description: Rogue Jedi turned dark side user who encountered Darth Bane and Darth Zannah.

name: Shin Hati
description: Apprentice of Baylan Skoll and skilled dark-side fighter pursuing Ahsoka Tano.

name: Shmi Skywalker
description: Mother of Anakin Skywalker. Lived as a slave on Tatooine.

name: Sifo-Dyas
description: Jedi Master who secretly commissioned the clone army from Kamino, manipulated by Darth Sidious.

name: Sirak
description: Powerful Zabrak Sith student and rival of Darth Bane at the Korriban academy.

name: Sskeer
description: Trandoshan Jedi Master during the High Republic era, known for his fierce combat style and troubled connection to the Force.

name: Stellan Gios
description: Respected Jedi Master and member of the Jedi Council during the High Republic era. Stationed aboard the Starlight Beacon.

name: Supreme Leader Snoke
description: Mysterious dark side leader of the First Order in the sequel trilogy.

name: Tech
description: The analytical genius of Clone Force 99. Skilled hacker and pilot with enhanced intelligence.

name: Thalias
description: Chiss caregiver and former sky-walker who accompanied Thrawn on missions for the Chiss Ascendancy.

name: Thane Kyrell
description: Imperial pilot who defected to the Rebellion after witnessing Imperial atrocities. Childhood friend and love interest of Ciena Ree.

name: The Sixth Brother
description: Imperial Inquisitor sent to hunt surviving Jedi. Encountered Ahsoka Tano during her exile.

name: Theron Shan
description: Republic agent and son of Jedi Grand Master Satele Shan. Led covert operations against the Sith Empire.

name: Tobias Beckett
description: Criminal mentor figure to young Han Solo.

name: Triple-Zero (0-0-0)
description: Protocol droid specializing in torture and etiquette, modeled after C-3PO. Worked with Doctor Aphra on black ops missions.

name: Vah'nya
description: Chiss sky-walker navigator with Force-like navigational abilities, serving the Chiss Ascendancy.

name: Val
description: Member of Tobias Beckett's crew during the coaxium heist.

name: Vice Admiral Holdo
description: Resistance leader who commanded during the evacuation in The Last Jedi.

name: Ward
description: Character appearing in The Mandalorian & Grogu film.

name: Wrecker
description: The enormous powerhouse of Clone Force 99. Loves explosives and has a soft spot for Omega.

name: Yoda
description: Ancient Jedi Grand Master. Trained Luke Skywalker on Dagobah.

name: Zeb Orrelios
description: Lasat warrior and muscle of the Ghost rebel crew. Last survivor of the Lasan massacre.

name: Zorii Bliss
description: Spice runner from Kijimi. Helped the Resistance in the final battle.

name: Mae Aniseya
description: Spice runner from Kijimi. Helped the Resistance in the final battle.

name: Qimir
description: Spice runner from Kijimi. Helped the Resistance in the final battle.

name: Sol
description: Spice runner from Kijimi. Helped the Resistance in the final battle.

name: Osha Aniyesa
description: Spice runner from Kijimi. Helped the Resistance in the final battle.

name: Vernesta Rhow
description: Spice runner from Kijimi. Helped the Resistance in the final battle.

name: Yord Fandar
description: Spice runner from Kijimi. Helped the Resistance in the final battle.
